  "findings": [
    "Inadequate bracing and kickers to withstand lateral concrete pour pressure",
    "High risk of form blowout or structural failure during the pour"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop the pour preparation immediately",
    "Install additional kickers, stakes, and bracing in accordance with ACI 347 lateral pressure calculations",
    "Verify all form ties and strongbacks are secured before resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "The formwork lacks the necessary structural bracing to resist lateral concrete pressure during placement. Proceeding with the pour under these conditions poses a high risk of form blowout, which is a severe safety hazard for workers and will ruin the concrete placement.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347 (Guide to Formwork for Concrete)"
  ]
}
